name: [smoke] integrated single mode renders without crashing
[smoke] plain option mode (1 child) renders without crashing
[fn] legend label renders as visible text
[fn] pressing a radio fires onValueChange with that value
[fn] pressing second option replaces first — onValueChange fires with new value
[fn] controlled value marks the matching radio as selected
[fn] field-level disabled is forwarded to all child radios
[fn] field-level size is forwarded to child radios
[fn] child own onPress fires before field selection logic
[fn] testID generates "${testID}-item-{value}" for each child radio
[fn] pressing fires onCheckedChange with toggled value
[fn] pressing also fires onValueChange with the singleOptionValue
[fn] pressing checked integrated radio clears it (value → "")
[fn] required=true renders asterisk in label row
[fn] error string renders as feedback text with liveRegion
[fn] invalid=true forwards errorHighlight to child radios
[fn] custom feedback ReactNode replaces error text
[fn] helperButton disabled when field is disabled
[bug] BUG-RF-1: Figma uses "require" but native prop is "required" — naming mismatch
[bug] BUG-RF-2: Figma labelText/descriptionText props not in native — silent data loss
